businessSummary.oneLiner: Government and enterprise AI data analytics platform leader, built on Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue exceeded $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). Pentagon adopted Maven AI as an official program of record for military-wide deployment. Selected as software developer for the $185B Golden Dome missile defense project. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - generative AI integration platform
AIP Bootcamps - rapid deployment programs driving customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: 6.7x the S&P 500 IT sector avg of 34x. Extreme premium, but gradually compressing with price decline

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026 EPS $1.32. Down from 112x. Still elevated vs growth stock avg of 30-40x

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: From FY2025 $4.48B to FY2026 $7.40B projected. AI defense demand driving growth acceleration

keyMetrics.name: P/S (Price-to-Sales)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 5-7x the software sector avg of 10-15x. Still in premium territory despite growth rate

keyMetrics.name: Market Cap
keyMetrics.interpretation: -31% from 52-week high of $207. Broad tech selloff driving decline

keyMetrics.name: RSI
keyMetrics.interpretation: Neutral zone. Room before oversold (30) but bounce momentum weak in downtrend

growthDrivers.title: Trefis: '50%+ surge catalyst analysis' (3/27)
growthDrivers.description: Trefis analyzed past PLTR 50%+ rallies and found current catalysts (Golden Dome, Maven) mirror historical surge patterns

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Palantir and Anduril selected to co-develop software for Trump administration's $185B Golden Dome missile defense system. Secures long-term defense revenue pipeline

growthDrivers.title: Czech National Bank purchases PLTR shares (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Czech National Bank bought 24,730 shares. A central bank buying AI defense stocks is a powerful institutional trust signal

growthDrivers.title: Bain & Company global partnership expansion (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Expanded partnership with Bain to accelerate global AIP and Foundry adoption. Consulting channel opens enterprise market penetration

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI: full US military adoption (Program of Record, 3/23)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as official program of record. Confirmed for long-term military-wide deployment

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 revenue guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in growth acceleration. US commercial +137% YoY as the core growth engine

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record, top-level security clearances, Maven military-wide adoption, combat-proven in Iran conflict. Moats money can't buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply embedded in government/military systems. Replacement cost is prohibitively high
Top-level clearances and 20+ year government trust. Virtually impossible for new entrants to replicate
AIP Bootcamps drive rapid customer acquisition. Ontology data model ecosystem expanding
Used in thousands of real-time targeting operations in the Iran conflict. Combat data is a competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Partnering with Palantir on Golden Dome. $60B valuation

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors. Far behind in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale advantage but lack Palantir's deep Ontology integration

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Significantly behind Palantir in revenue and growth

recentNews.headline: Simply Wall St: PLTR valuation reassessment, long-term defense growth confirmed despite short-term weakness
recentNews.significance: Despite weekly -5.1% decline, analysis confirms Golden Dome could fundamentally reshape long-term defense revenue structure

recentNews.headline: PLTR -3% to $143.06, broad tech selloff continues
recentNews.significance: 3 consecutive down days. Below both 50-day ($148.62) and 200-day ($168.58) MAs. Broad tech weakness

recentNews.headline: Trefis: 'What could send Palantir stock soaring 50%+'
recentNews.significance: Historical rally pattern analysis shows current catalysts (Golden Dome, Maven) mirror past 50%+ surges

recentNews.headline: Czech National Bank buys 24,730 shares
recentNews.significance: Central bank purchasing AI defense stock is a powerful institutional confidence signal

recentNews.headline: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection
recentNews.significance: Co-developing software for $185B space-based missile defense with Anduril

analystOpinions.notableComment: MarketBeat consensus $198.59 (+39%). Rosenblatt $200 Buy. Simply Wall St: short-term weakness, long-term defense transformation confirmed. Valuation debate continues

risks.title: Extreme valuation premium
risks.description: P/E 227x (6.7x S&P IT avg of 34x), P/S 76x (5-7x software avg). Forward PE 108x is 3x growth stock average. Expectations are heavily embedded in the price

risks.title: Below both 50-day and 200-day MAs
risks.description: Below 50-day ($148.62) and 200-day ($168.58). 3 consecutive down days with continuing downward momentum. $126 support is open

risks.title: Macro tech selloff risk
risks.description: Iran-Israel war, oil surge, 'No Kings' protests with 8M attendees. Broad tech selling unfavorable for high-valuation tech stocks

risks.title: Analyst opinion split
risks.description: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Market skepticism on valuation persists

risks.title: Stock-based compensation dilution
risks.description: Share count growing 4.67% annually. Ongoing SBC diluting existing shareholders

buyReasons.title: Irreplaceable AI defense position + long-term pipeline
buyReasons.rationale: Golden Dome $185B + Maven program of record + combat-proven in Iran. Czech central bank buying. Unsubstitutable in defense AI

buyReasons.title: Explosive commercial growth + partner expansion
buyReasons.rationale: US commercial Q4 +137%. Bain partnership accelerates global AIP adoption. FY2026 +65% guidance

buyReasons.title: -31% discount from 52-week high
buyReasons.rationale: Down from $207 to $143 while fundamentals strengthened via Golden Dome and Maven. Price declined as business improved

buyReasons.title: Trefis: 50%+ surge catalyst analysis
buyReasons.rationale: Current catalysts mirror historical 50%+ rally patterns. Rebound magnitude could be substantial

overallOpinion: Simply Wall St reassessed PLTR's valuation and confirmed that Golden Dome could fundamentally reshape the long-term defense revenue structure, despite weekly -5.1% weakness. Trefis also sees 50%+ surge catalysts accumulating
Below both 50-day ($149) and 200-day ($169) MAs. Iran-Israel war, oil surge, and 8M-person 'No Kings' protests are creating the worst possible environment for high-valuation tech stocks

Valuation remains the core burden. P/E 227x (6.7x IT avg), P/S 76x. Fundamentals are the strongest ever with Golden Dome, Maven, Czech central bank buying, but the market dismisses it all with 'too expensive'
Consensus $199 (+39%). Down 31% from highs. Hold, small DCA only. Aggressive buying requires macro stabilization and valuation normalization

investmentVerdict.summary: Fundamentals are the strongest ever: Golden Dome, Maven, commercial +137% growth. But P/E 227x and below both MAs with macro headwinds make aggressive buying risky. Simply Wall St confirms long-term positive, short-term negative. Small DCA acceptable; full commitment requires macro clarity

witty.text:
$PLTR $143.06 (-3%)

Golden Dome, Maven, central bank buying, Bain, +65% growth, Trefis surge analysis. The catalyst list is endless.

Market's response: 'P/E 227x.' Discussion over.

Simply Wall St says long-term structure changes. The market asks how long. 8M protesters and Iran war make it the worst time for expensive tech.

Consensus $199 (+39%). -31% from highs. Hold. Conviction = small DCA. No conviction = watch.

empathy.hook: PLTR shareholders, -31% from highs is exhausting. The fundamentals are worth the wait.

$PLTR $143.06 (-3%), -31% from highs.

The daily declines are draining. Simply Wall St acknowledges the short-term pain.

But Golden Dome $185B, Maven, Czech central bank, Trefis 50%+ surge analysis. The company is the strongest it's ever been.

P/E 227x is a burden, but +65% growth catches up. Iran war won't last forever.

Consensus $199 (+39%). Small DCA gradually. Long-term is the path.
